context: Tests whether the ios-networking skill routes REST, Network.framework, ATS, certificate pinning, NWPathMonitor, and NetworkConnection guidance to the right boundaries.

checklist.name: URLSession Default
checklist.description: Recommends URLSession for ordinary REST or HTTP API calls and reserves Network.framework for lower-level TCP, UDP, listeners, Bonjour, path monitoring, WebSocket protocol work, or iOS 26 NetworkConnection needs.

checklist.name: ATS Responsibility
checklist.description: States that ATS applies to the URL Loading system and that Network.framework callers are responsible for configuring secure connections correctly.

checklist.name: Narrow Exceptions
checklist.description: Rejects global NSAllowsArbitraryLoads as a default and recommends fixing servers or using the narrowest justified ATS exception.

checklist.name: Pinning Boundary
checklist.description: Corrects raw SecKeyCopyExternalRepresentation hashing as insufficient for SPKI pinning and routes deep certificate-trust implementation to the security skill.

checklist.name: Path Monitoring
checklist.description: Uses NWPathMonitor as AsyncSequence on current OS targets or explicitly labels a wrapper as fallback or custom projection.

checklist.name: NetworkConnection Async
checklist.description: For iOS 26 NetworkConnection QUIC streams, treats openStream and inboundStreams as async throwing APIs.

checklist.name: Scope Control
checklist.description: Preserves sibling-skill boundaries and avoids expanding into a full Security framework or backend TLS guide.
